args.query: SELECT qli.Id, qli.QuoteId, qli.Product2Id, qli.PricebookEntryId, qli.Quantity, qli.UnitPrice, qli.Discount, qli.TotalPrice, p2.Name as ProductName, p2.IsActive FROM QuoteLineItem qli LEFT JOIN Product2 p2 ON qli.Product2Id = p2.Id WHERE qli.QuoteId = '#0Q0Wt000001WRAzKAO';
